result:
The project is fully set up and typechecks cleanly. Here's a summary of what was built:

- **`src/index.ts`** — Remotion entry point that calls `registerRoot`
- **`src/Root.tsx`** — Registers the `HelloVideo` composition (1080×1080, 30fps, 300 frames = 10s)
- **`src/HelloComposition.tsx`** — The main composition with:
  - A dark gradient background
  - "Hello" title that fades in via `interpolate` over the first 30 frames and stays visible
  - Three `Caption` components for "one" (120–180), "two" (180–240), "three" (240–300), each using a `spring()` scale pop-in with easing

The render command would be:
```
npx remotion render src/index.ts HelloVideo
```

EVAL_DONE
